case_title: DEPARTMENT STORES NATIONAL BANK VS. MARI J MINGOA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF RE: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRANSACTION ID # 66035085) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT STORES NATIONAL BANK

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT STORES NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT MINGOA, MARI J SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-29-2020
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-10-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-09-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
